positive: A highly detailed, central composition of stylized mystical woodland fauna (deer, owl, fox) intertwined with geometric celestial elements (crescents, constellations, lunar phases). The artwork should be rendered in the style of deep, vintage etching combined with clean, modern linocut art. Emphasize strong, graphic silhouettes, high contrast black and white ink with strategic pops of color (e.g., deep moss green and burnt sienna). The composition must be perfectly balanced and suitable for seamless repetition or placement on apparel. Studio lighting, crisp lines, intricate detail, vector illustration quality, 8k resolution.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands, missing parts, text, signature, watermark, cropped, low resolution, gradient, realistic photo, cartoon, child drawings
